cells.rationale: Rewrites the producer-owned block-escalation latch state machine under event-sourcing determinism invariants where exactly-once dispatch, the double-dispatch liveness guard, and category-class classification are subtle correctness concerns that reintroduce the failure class if the re-arm abstraction is wrong -- a nameable opus gate, at xhigh for the multi-region daemon+CLI blast radius.
